# requireStepUp

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query query hook for requireStepUp

## Usage

```typescript
useRequireStepUpQuery({ stepUpType: '<String>' })
```

## Examples

### Use useRequireStepUpQuery

```typescript
const { data, isLoading } = useRequireStepUpQuery({ stepUpType: '<String>' });
```
